DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT C-TWO GROUP, INC., A CORPORATION C&L ASSOCIATES INC. CA, A BUSINESS ORGANIZATION, FORM UNKNOWN, DBA INFUSION LOUNGE HEARING SET FOR JUL-17-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT C-TWO GROUP, INC., AND, C&L ASSOCIATES INC., DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR CONVERSION, PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE WHAT PROPERTY DEFENDANT CONVERTED. AS TO THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENT INTERFERENCE, PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE INTERFERENCE BEYOND THE BREACH OF CONTRACT AND SPECIFY ACTUAL THIRD PARTY RELATIONSHIPS. AS TO THE FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION, PLAINTIFF MUST SPECIFY THE MISREPRESENTATION WITH PARTICULARITY. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-24-2009 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2009 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-08-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT C-TWO GROUP, INC., and, C&L ASSOCIATES INC., DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend. As to the second cause of action for conversion, plaintiff must allege what property defendant converted. As to the third cause of action for negligent interference, plaintiff must allege interference beyond the breach of contract and specify actual third party relationships. As to the fourth cause of action for negligent misrepresentation, plaintiff must specify the misrepresentation with particularity. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
